What are the documents required for application and registration?

Please

click here

for detailed information about admission requirements for undergraduate programmes.

Please

click here

for detailed information about admission requirements for graduate programmes.

Can the university help me to get a visa?

If you are from countries that require a visa to enter Turkey, you can apply for the relevant visa with your acceptance letter. If you face any difficulties, you can always contact us via our e-mail address –

[email protected]

How can i know if i am able to apply as an international student?

Please read the rules on

our page

that are set by YÖK (Council of Higher Education of Turkey). You can always get in touch with us via

[email protected]

as well if you still have any concerns or questions regarding your eligibility.

How can i apply?

You should register and apply through our

website

.

How long does the evaluation process take?

Usually, the application results reach the candidates within two weeks on average.

Is my diploma that i got from a Turkish university valid in European Union countries?

Since Turkey is a part of European Higher Education Area, diplomas taken from Turkish Universities are recognized in European Union countries.

I graduated from a foreign university and have recognition problem in Turkey. how can i solve this problem?

You need to contact Equivalency Unit of the Turkish Council of Higher Education. Please

click here

for the official website of the Equivalency Unit.

click here
